title: Incy PLUS
description: The official vanilla plus modpack of the Hardcore YouTuber Incy
body: The official vanilla plus modpack of the Hardcore YouTuber Incy. This modpack adds a few Vanilla PLUS mods to enhance the default feeling of Minecraft without deviating too far from the base game. Mods like particular and sounds help to make the game feel more alive and dynamic, while others like freecam, Flashback, and modmenu help give creators the edge they need when making cinematic content. There have also been general UI improvments through the use of mods such as better F3, and better statistics screen.
